title: Creativity, Inc.
author: Ed Catmull
subline: Overcoming the unseen forces that stand in the way of true inspiration.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Luxo Jr. desk-lamp silhouette made of 4 hairline strokes. The lamp head + the light beam it casts are the only RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1800)" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <line x1="-60" y1="280" x2="60" y2="280" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="280" x2="-160" y2="60" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="-160" cy="60" r="6" fill="#cccccc"/>
    <line x1="-160" y1="60" x2="160" y2="-100" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="-100" x2="80" y2="-220" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="160" y1="-100" x2="240" y2="-220" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <ellipse cx="160" cy="-228" rx="80" ry="14" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6" stroke-dasharray="3 6">
      <line x1="120" y1="-220" x2="60" y2="260"/>
      <line x1="160" y1="-220" x2="160" y2="260"/>
      <line x1="200" y1="-220" x2="260" y2="260"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Luxo Jr. — Pixar's mascot and visual identity — rebuilt in three hairline strokes. The lamp head + the light beam it casts are the only red elements on the cover, suggesting the spark/illumination the book is about. Title 'Creativity, Inc.' sits centered, weight 300 whisper — the lamp is loud, the type is quiet, the way Catmull writes about creative culture.
